CREATE TABLE test_tuples (id UInt32, values Tuple(Int32, Int32));
SELECT tupleNegate(values) FROM test_tuples WHERE id = 1;
SELECT t.id, tupleNegate(t.values) FROM test_tuples AS t WHERE t.id > 1;
CREATE TABLE t2 (val Tuple(Int32, Int32, Int32));
SELECT tupleNegate((SELECT tuple(3, 2, 1) FROM t2 LIMIT 1));
SELECT tupleNegate((SELECT tuple(x, y) FROM (SELECT 1 AS x, 2 AS y) AS subquery));
SELECT tupleNegate(t1.values) FROM test_tuples AS t1 JOIN test_tuples AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.id < 3;
SELECT tupleNegate((SELECT tuple(10, 20) FROM t2 WHERE val.1 = 4 LIMIT 1));
CREATE TABLE complex_tuples (a Tuple(Tuple(Int32, Int32), Tuple(Int32, Int32)));
SELECT tupleNegate(a) FROM complex_tuples WHERE a.1.1 < 0;
